_comment: Example fixture showing how a future product would be added to the Product Registry. Copy this file, fill in real values, and create brands/<slug>/brand-config.json. No code changes required.
_routing_note: IMPORTANT: A draft product will NOT route events even if Meta IDs are present. Only activation_status=active or activation_status=testing products are routed. Set activation_status to 'testing' only after IDs are confirmed and routing is validated.
routing_blocked_reason: activation_status is draft — only testing/active products route events
